title: "skiaParagraphTextMeasureCapability()"

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Build a synchronous Skia Paragraph-backed text capability from an already-ready runtime.

Hosts should load fonts first (for example with React Native Skia `useFonts`, which returns
null until ready) and pass explicit readiness facts to `skiaReadyTextMeasurements`.

## Import

```ts
import { skiaParagraphTextMeasureCapability } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout/skia";
```

## Signature

```ts
function skiaParagraphTextMeasureCapability(opts: SkiaParagraphTextCapabilityOptions): SkiaTextMeasureCapability
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `SkiaParagraphTextCapabilityOptions` | Missing @param opts JSDoc. |

## Returns

`SkiaTextMeasureCapability`
